slide1.title: Monitor and Control Water Consumption in Your Home
slide1.description: An innovative system for tracking and monitoring water consumption in real time. Save money, protect the environment, and take control of your water resources.

feature-characteristics.title: Key Features
feature-characteristics.description: Everything you need to fully control water usage in your home.

items.title: Real-Time Analysis
items.description: Visualize your water consumption instantly and make informed decisions to save.

items.title: Smart Alerts
items.description: Receive notifications about unusual consumption, possible leaks, or high expenses.

items.title: Mobile Access
items.description: Access your data from any device, anytime and anywhere.

items.title: Cost Reduction
items.description: Identify saving opportunities and reduce your monthly bill.

items.title: Secure Data
items.description: Your information is protected with the highest security standards.

items.title: Complete History
items.description: Access your full consumption history whenever you need it.

feature-function.title: How It Works?
feature-function.description: Getting started is simple and quick. Follow these 4 steps and start saving water today.

items.title: Registration
items.description: Register your home and provide basic information about your water meter.

items.title: Meter Reading
items.description: Enter your meter readings periodically or set up automatic tracking.

items.title: Analysis
items.description: The system analyzes your consumption, identifies patterns, and generates recommendations.

items.title: Save
items.description: Make informed decisions and reduce your water consumption and costs.
